about.title: About this Project
about.methodology_text: We crawl DBLP for first author names of papers published at CCF-rated CS conferences (2010-2025), then use name-based nationality prediction to infer likely language backgrounds.
about.disclaimer_text: Names are terrible predictors of language. We did it anyway. This is meant as a fun, light-hearted visualization — not a rigorous sociolinguistic study. No discrimination intended.
about.accuracy_text: Name-based nationality inference is inherently imprecise. Many factors (immigration, marriage, cultural mixing) make names unreliable indicators. Treat all results as rough approximations.
